parameters.url: =https://wjukfdziomnejtlmegvv.supabase.co/rest/v1/daily_metrics?business_id=eq.{{ $('Loop Each Business').first().json.business_id }}&date=gte.{{ new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString().split('T')[0] }}&date=lte.{{ $('Loop Each Business').first().json.today }}&select=date,spend,revenue,organic_traffic,churn_count,active_customers,campaign_spend,campaign_revenue,campaign_started_at

parameters.title: =[CIRCUIT BREAKER] {{ $('Check Circuit Breakers').first().json.business_name }} - {{ $('Check Circuit Breakers').first().json.breaker_count }} breaker(s) triggered

parameters.subject: =[CIRCUIT BREAKER] {{ $('Check Circuit Breakers').first().json.business_name }} - {{ $('Check Circuit Breakers').first().json.breaker_count }} breaker(s) triggered

nodes.name: Pause Cold Email & Ads (system_config)
nodes.notes: Resilience gate: When circuit breaker fires, automatically disable cold email and ads for this business in system_config to prevent further spend.
